title: dimorphanthera amblyornidis
intro: Dimorphanthera amblyornidis is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Epacridaceae, native to the tropical regions of New Guinea. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its leaves and roots having been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dimorphanthera amblyornidis include its potential to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its use as an antidote to snake bites and other venomous bites. Herbal preparations of Dimorphanthera amblyornidis have been traditionally made by decocting the leaves and roots in water, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
